message: No SPF detected in your AM routine. Many dermatologists consider daily SPF the most evidence-backed step for limiting sun-related changes in skin appearance.
Your routine includes multiple actives but no barrier-support product. Many people pair actives with a ceramide- or panthenol-containing product to support the skin barrier.
No humectant (hyaluronic acid, glycerin, panthenol, etc.) detected in your routine. Humectants are commonly used to draw water into the upper layers of the skin.
No antioxidant detected in your AM routine. Many people who care about visible signs of aging add a vitamin C serum in the morning to pair with sunscreen.
No cleanser detected in your routine. A gentle cleanser is the typical starting point of both AM and PM routines.
